bidder: Servier S.A.S. (via Servier Detroit Inc., a wholly owned subsidiary of Servier Pharmaceuticals LLC)
L1_headline: + DAWN – Servier announces planned tender offer (pre-commencement). | 03/06/25
L2_brief: Servier S.A.S., through its subsidiary Servier Detroit Inc., has entered into a Merger Agreement dated March 6, 2026 to acquire all outstanding shares of Day One Biopharmaceuticals (DAWN) via a tender offer that has not yet commenced. This SC TO-C filing relates solely to preliminary communications made before the commencement of the tender offer. No offer price, premium, or board recommendation details are disclosed in this pre-commencement communication.

offer_terms.offer_type: Unable to determine from this filing
offer_terms.shares_sought: All issued and outstanding shares of common stock, $0.0001 par value per share

timing.offer_commenced: Not yet commenced — this filing relates solely to preliminary communications

L3_detailed.board_recommendation: UNABLE TO DETERMINE — No board recommendation is disclosed in this pre-commencement communication. The Company is expected to file a Schedule 14D-9 solicitation/recommendation statement after the tender offer commences.
L3_detailed.background_of_transaction: Servier S.A.S., Servier Pharmaceuticals LLC (Parent), and Servier Detroit Inc. (Merger Sub) entered into an Agreement and Plan of Merger with Day One Biopharmaceuticals dated March 6, 2026. No further background or negotiation history is provided in this pre-commencement communication.
conditions_to_offer: Sufficient shareholders tendering their shares (specific minimum not disclosed)
No injunctions or legal impediments (implied from forward-looking risk factors)
Other conditions per the Merger Agreement (not detailed in this filing)

required: Referenced generically — specific approvals not enumerated in this filing
regulatory_approvals.status: Not yet filed based on pre-commencement nature of this communication

L3_detailed.competing_offers: None mentioned; forward-looking risk factors reference 'the possibility that competing offers will be made'
L3_detailed.litigation: Forward-looking risk factors reference 'the outcome of legal proceedings that may be instituted against the Company and/or others relating to the transaction' but no actual litigation is disclosed
L3_detailed.amendment_changes: N/A — this is the initial SC TO-C (pre-commencement communication), not an amendment
risks_flagged: Tender offer has not yet commenced — all material terms still to be disclosed in forthcoming Schedule TO and Schedule 14D-9
Risk that insufficient shareholders tender their shares
